'''Bralla Hemm''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] personnel officer stationed onboard the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] in the months leading up to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Hemm sent out a message seeking volunteers with military experience from among refugees from Kothlis on board ''Liberty''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
